The plan appears to be executable as written. The added check for at_goal after the move_spot action ensures that the robot will not attempt to move if it is already at the target. The rotate_spot action now includes a numeric degree value, which is a required parameter. The plan also includes a call to the planner to request a new behavior tree if the current one is no longer sufficient.
